title: Craft Obsidian
description: Craft Obsidian by crafting together buckets of water and lava!
body:
# Obsidian Crafting Mod

![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dPHKQ6xy/8bb84d62e3e17f812d8285f6c4dba007f4f304a1.png)

## Easily craft obsidian with the Obsidian Crafting Mod!

Tired of mining obsidian blocks? The Obsidian Crafting Mod simplifies the process by allowing you to craft obsidian using water and lava buckets. Save time and effort by crafting obsidian directly in your crafting table.

## Features:

- Simple Crafting Recipe: Combine one bucket of water with at least one bucket of lava to create obsidian.
- Scalable Production: Use up to eight buckets of lava with one bucket of water to craft up to eight obsidian blocks in a single recipe.

## Efficient Resource Management:

- Perfect for players looking to streamline their resource collection and crafting processes.
- Ideal for large-scale builds or projects requiring significant amounts of obsidian.

## Seamless Integration:

- Crafting recipes are easy to use and fit naturally within the vanilla Minecraft crafting system.

With the Obsidian Crafting Mod, you can focus more on building and less on tedious mining. It's a practical addition for any Minecraft player looking to enhance their gameplay efficiency.

_Download now and simplify your obsidian crafting with the Obsidian Crafting Mod!_

## Compatibility:

The Craft Obsidian mod is compatible with the following Minecraft versions for Fabric:
- [1.21](https://modrinth.com/mod/craft-obsidian/versions?l=fabric&g=1.21)
- [1.20.x](https://modrinth.com/mod/craft-obsidian/versions?l=fabricg=1.20.4&g=1.20&g=1.20.1&g=1.20.2&g=1.20.3&g=1.20.5&g=1.20.6)
- [1.19.x](https://modrinth.com/mod/craft-obsidian/versions?l=fabric&g=1.19.4)
- [1.16.x](https://modrinth.com/mod/craft-obsidian/versions?l=fabric&g=1.16.5)
- [1.15.x](https://modrinth.com/mod/craft-obsidian/versions?l=fabric&g=1.15.2)
- [1.14.x](https://modrinth.com/mod/craft-obsidian/versions?l=fabric&g=1.14.4)
